name: Global Unichip Corp.
summary: Global Unichip Corp. researches, develops, produces, tests, and sells embedded memory, logic, and analog components for various application ICs in Taiwan, China, Europe, Japan, Korea, and North America. The company offers designing, wafer manufacturing, packaging, and testing services for ASIC and wafer products; circuit design cell library and various intellectual properties (IPs) required in the process of product design; circuit layouts for mask making; and subcontract mask making, wafer manufacturing, dicing, and packaging to vendors, as well as conducts testing. It also integrates multiple design projects of various customers on single mask and by a wafer engineer run; and provides customization, consulting, designing, technical support, and IP licensing services, as well as provides cell libraries; and EDA tools. In addition, the company offers system on a chip (SoC) design services, such as technology design, design methodology, low power solution, and testability design services; SoC manufacturing services consisting of packaging, testing and product engineering, and quality and reliability, as well as supply chain management services; and IP portfolio, including synthesizable implementation IP, and hardened PHYs and verification IP for ASIC, FPGA, and SoC designs. Global Unichip Corp. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
